---
title: ""
---


TELE-SPEAK Nepal is an online platform designed to improve access to **speech, language and hearing health, and overall communication support** across Nepal and Nepali diaspora globally. Many individuals and families in Nepal face barriers to accessing specialized speech, language and hearing services due to limited availability of professionals, geographic challenges, travel burden, and lack of awareness.
TELE-SPEAK Nepal aims to reduce these barriers through accessible telepractice-based support delivered remotely/online.

---

## OUR VISION

To ensure that individuals across the globe have access to quality speech, language and hearing health services, regardless of their location.

---


## WHO WE SERVE?

- Children with communication delays  
- Adults with communication difficulties  
- Individuals with hearing or tinnitus concerns  
- Caregivers and families  
- Schools and community organizations  

---

## OUR APPROACH

- Evidence/[research](https://nccsnepal.org/research.html) based practice  
- Multilingual tele-consultation (in Nepali, English, and Hindi)
- Family-centered support  
- Functional and real-life communication focus 
- Awareness-raising through workshops, training, and community education
- Referral guidance when in-person care is needed
